_comment: Per-site profile for the multi-site QI bundle. Copy to sites/<site>.json (gitignored) and edit. Access + timezone + clif_version + unit_labels + enabled_metrics + optional vocabulary_overrides. The shared clinical definitions live in definitions/<metric>.json (committed). Run the bundle for this site with: ./run_bundle.sh --site <site>  (or CLIF_SITE=<site>). Output -> output/<site>/.
_comment_as_of: Data-snapshot date this build reflects (YYYY-MM-DD), stamped into feed provenance + the share manifest. Bump it each refresh, or pass it per-run with ./run_site.sh --as-of YYYY-MM-DD (CLIF_AS_OF env). null = unset. Reads no CLIF data; it is just a label.

vocabulary_overrides._comment: Rarely needed — a metric key here REPLACES that whole knob block from definitions/<metric>.json for this site (e.g. site-specific mode_category strings). Leave empty when the site's CLIF vocabulary matches the canonical definitions.
